note: Live status from real read-only probes. Update with engine.py validate --set <id>=<status>.

connectors.name: Email — Mailchimp
connectors.detail: Mailchimp MCP supports planning/content/design/save/analytics; sending and test-sends are app-only. Email atom saved as a Gmail draft (id r8727177065748110764). No Brevo connector.
connectors.fallback: Gmail create_draft for a small owned list; finalize/send in the Mailchimp app.
connectors.blocker: No MCP send path; owned list must exist.

connectors.name: Social — LinkedIn & X
connectors.detail: No native publish connector. Route via Zapier->Buffer or manual. Ahrefs social tools are read-only analytics.
connectors.fallback: Manual post / Buffer queue from engine-produced assets.

connectors.name: Keyword & AI-citation — Ahrefs / Semrush
connectors.detail: Ahrefs returned 'Insufficient plan'; Semrush plan lacks MCP access. Both gated.
connectors.fallback: Manual: autocomplete + People-Also-Ask + ask-the-assistants citation harvesting.
connectors.blocker: Paid plans do not expose MCP/API. Upgrade or use manual fallback.

connectors.name: Design / carousels — Canva
connectors.detail: Authenticated. 0 brand kits configured -> off-brand risk until one is added.
connectors.fallback: Hand-build the carousel in Canva from the engine's slide outline.
connectors.blocker: No brand kit yet (quality caveat, not a hard block).

connectors.name: Short-form video — Higgsfield
connectors.detail: Ultra plan, ~2,044 credits. Live and well-funded.
connectors.fallback: Manual edit from the engine's script in any video tool.

connectors.name: Measurement — Supermetrics / GA4
connectors.detail: GA4 (GAWA) NOT_AUTHENTICATED; 0 of 172 sources connected. Login link available.
connectors.fallback: Read GA4 web UI manually; rely on UTM tags + form-backend counts.
connectors.blocker: One-click GA4 login required before any numbers flow.

connectors.name: Cold outbound — Apollo (slow track)
connectors.detail: Authenticated; 2,500 lead + 250k AI credits. 4-step sequence BUILT inactive (id 6a3aeafb2181cc0014f1ff73). Send only after warmup.
connectors.fallback: Manual outreach from the engine's sequence copy.

connectors.name: Cold-email domain warmup (day-one process)
connectors.detail: Not started. Hard 2-6 week floor; gates the outbound connector.
connectors.fallback: None — this is infrastructure, not a connector.
connectors.blocker: Buy sending domain, set SPF/DKIM/DMARC, warm gradually, build verified list.
